data.title: Kung Fu Wang: Meng Hu Shangshan
Bei Ken Xiong: Huoxing Renwu
data.synopsis:
In order to regain recognition, the most unlucky agent, Backkom Bear, sneaked into the Mars mission, but unexpectedly broke into the mysterious world of Mars and became friends with the Martian monster he wanted to capture. Between the honor of an agent and friendship, he will face an unprecedented test.

(Source: TMDB)

titles.title: 小美人鱼之大海怪传说
The Little Mermaid and the Sea Monster

data.title: Xiao Meirenyu: Dahai Guai Chuanshuo
data.title_english: The Little Mermaid and the Sea Monster
data.title_japanese: 小美人鱼之大海怪传说

data.title: Kozukuri Ninkatsu Bu!
data.synopsis: Ao Suto is a self-confessed otaku. He talks about otaku with her classmates every day, and of course he has never had a girlfriend. Perhaps because he is seen like this, his classmate, Umi Tono calls him Otaku-kun instead of his name and treats him coldly. But he also had a dream. His goal is to find a good partner and start a family. The school also has a club to make dreams come true, a child-making and pregnancy club. The child-making and pregnancy-hunting club is a nationally sanctioned club activity that encourages students to become pregnant and conducts pregnancy-hunting activities. Ao was able to join the club after the selection process. According to his advisor, there is a girl who wants to be Ao's partner. Ao couldn't believe her eyes because the girl who entered the club room was Ukai Tono, who treated Ao coldly.

data.title: Sanshiliu Qi
data.synopsis:
Emperor Ming of the Han Dynasty bestowed Ban Chao, who came from a family of historians, the Bronze Swallow Tally, and delegated him on a mission to the Western Regions in search of the secret of immortality and the Golden Buddha which he once dreamed of. Ban Chao gathered together Kungfu masters hidden in the capital, the heirs to the Mo Clan, members of the Thieves' Guild, and the Yelang shaman, etc., in total of thirty-six people to form his squad. In addition to fulfilling the Emperor's wish, during this mission, he also tried to find his family's historical connections and the real culprit who framed his father.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Nian Yuan Huai Ren's (念远怀人) novel of the same title.
